personality: 1 iOS-Native Clean structure with 3 Editorial Mobile typography and warmth
personality_one_liner: A precision-engineered yet warmly traditional event experience for elite aviation professionals.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical rhythm. Use md/lg for internal card padding, lg/xl for screen edges. Group related metadata tightly (sm).

do's: Use glass effect for the bottom tab bar as content scrolls behind it.
Apply frosted glass overlay to featured event cards over hero imagery (e.g., Royal Yacht Banquet card).
Use glass for sticky date-selector headers over the scrolling schedule.
dont's: Never blur standard list rows or session cards.
Do not use glassmorphism on forms or the live message feed cards.

screens.name: Schedule
screens.purpose: A precision timeline of the 3-day symposium and registration, allowing pilots to plan their days and save sessions.

states.loading: Centered spinner with a subtle aviation icon.
states.empty: Illustration of a calendar with 'No sessions found for this day'.
states.error: Message 'Unable to load schedule. Working offline?' with Retry button.

screens.layout: Sticky top date selector (glassmorphism) for Jul 25-29. Below, a vertical list of session cards. Each card uses `surfaceSecondary`, 12px radius, left-aligned time column, bold title, and location pin. Primary CTA (Save session) on the right. 'Favorite/Saved' indicated by a `brandTertiary` (tartan ochre) filled icon.

screens.name: Messages
screens.purpose: Live, real-time feed of announcements and updates from the 3 seeded admins.

states.empty: Illustration of an aircraft comms headset with 'No announcements yet'.
states.error: Message 'Cannot connect to comms.' with Retry button.

screens.layout: Vertical feed. Message cards have admin initials/avatar, timestamp (top right), and message body. Clean, high-contrast typography. For admins: A floating action button (FAB) with glassmorphism to post new messages.

screens.name: City Guide
screens.purpose: A curated, offline-ready local guide tailored for American delegates navigating Edinburgh.

states.loading: Spinner over a blurred silhouette of Edinburgh.
states.empty: Illustration of a map with 'Guide content unavailable'.
states.error: Message 'City guide unavailable offline.' with Retry button.

screens.layout: Hero image of Edinburgh skyline with a dark gradient scrim and "Welcome to Edinburgh" header in Playfair Display. Below, a 2-column grid of category cards (Trams/Transport, USD to GBP, Plugs/Adapters, Tips). Venues section features horizontal scrolling cards with images (e.g., Royal Yacht Britannia, Royal College of Physicians of Edinburgh) and map links.

screens.name: Personal Agenda & Profile
screens.purpose: User's saved sessions overview and access point for admin login.

states.empty: Illustration of an empty pilot logbook with 'No saved sessions yet'.
states.error: Message 'Unable to load profile.' with Retry.

screens.layout: Top section shows user delegate status. Middle section lists saved sessions (same card style as Schedule). Bottom features a subtle, clearly marked 'Admin Login' area (or a settings gear leading to it) for the 3 seeded admins.

edinburgh_skyline_hero.alt: Edinburgh skyline with high rise buildings under white sky

royal_yacht_britannia.alt: Interior of the Royal Yacht Britannia with wooden walls

edinburgh_tram_guide.alt: Edinburgh city street with historic architecture and transport

aviation_symposium_hero.alt: Fighter jet flying through a cloudy blue sky

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the '1 iOS-Native Clean' structure for highly legible, functional schedules and feeds, but apply the '3 Editorial Mobile' typography and color tokens for the heritage feel.
Implement offline support gracefully. Schedule and City Guide must cache and display offline. Admins posting messages requires online connectivity, display clear error states if offline.
For the City Guide, prioritize information crucial to American delegates (transport apps/trams, tipping culture, USD to GBP, plug adapters). Structure this as easily scannable category cards.
Ensure all hero images (like the Edinburgh skyline on the City Guide) have a mandatory vertical gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse at the bottom) so overlaid text is fully readable.
Session cards should have an unmistakable 'Save/Favorite' button using the brandTertiary (tartan ochre) color for active states.
The Live Messages tab is a read-only feed for delegates. Hide the 'Post Message' FAB or input area unless logged in as one of the 3 seeded admins.
Include a mock data set for July 25-29, including sessions at the Royal Yacht Britannia, Royal College of Physicians of Edinburgh, and St Paul's & St George's church.
Make touch targets large (>=44pt), especially for the Schedule date selector and session 'Favorite' toggles.
